benefits.description: Zero injection pain and burn when BPC-157 and TB-500 are mixed with NAD+ and GHK-Cu; complete elimination of pain that was previously severe and lasted hours

side_effects.description: Significant burning pain during and after NAD+ injection (100mg doses), lasting hours; GHK-Cu also caused burning pain

protocol_notes: Mixing protocol: 3ml added to 75mg GHK vial; 2ml added to 6/6mg BPC/TB vial; 1ml of GHK moved to BPC/TB vial; injecting 20u per dose. Final mixed protocol dosage: 1670mcg GHK-Cu with 400mcg BPC-157 and 400mcg TB-500 per 20u injection (15 total doses). Initial experiment: ~500mcg of BPC/TB combo (250 each) mixed into 300mg NAD+. Later: 5u of BPC mix in 40u NAD+. Also taking 2-3 zinc supplements per week at 30mg each. Used multi-peptide calculator (blendify.glitch.me) for dosing. Injection site: upper thigh between outside and front area.
